criterionNotes.what: Clearly describes the autoscaling behavior needed for inference workloads.
criterionNotes.why: Strong business justification tied to customer throughput requirements.
criterionNotes.how: Specifies HPA-based scaling with custom metrics from inference gateway.
criterionNotes.task: Could be more specific about acceptance criteria.
criterionNotes.size: Well-scoped to a single scaling mechanism.

latest.verdict: High-quality RFE with clear problem statement and solution approach.
latest.feedback:
**Strengths:**
- Clear description of the scaling problem
- Specific metrics identified for scaling triggers

**Suggestions:**
- Add explicit acceptance criteria for latency thresholds
- Consider mentioning rollback behavior

criterionNotes.what: Mentions GPU monitoring but lacks specifics on what metrics.
criterionNotes.how: Vague reference to a dashboard without implementation details.
criterionNotes.task: No acceptance criteria or definition of done.

latest.verdict: Needs significant revision to meet quality standards.
latest.feedback:
**Issues:**
- Missing business justification (WHY Void)
- No acceptance criteria defined (Task Masquerade)

**Recommendations:**
- Add a section explaining why GPU monitoring is needed
- Define specific metrics to be displayed
- List acceptance criteria

criterionNotes.why: Strong strategic alignment with customer requests.
criterionNotes.how: Could provide more detail on supported model architectures.
criterionNotes.task: Clear acceptance criteria with measurable outcomes.
criterionNotes.size: Scope is broad; consider splitting into multiple RFEs.

latest.verdict: Strong RFE with room for improvement in scoping.
latest.feedback:
Well-written RFE with clear problem statement.

**Suggestions:**
- Consider splitting into separate RFEs for different model architectures
- Add performance benchmarks as acceptance criteria

criterionNotes.what: Mentions OpenTelemetry but lacks pipeline context.
criterionNotes.why: Basic justification but could be stronger.

latest.feedback:
This RFE needs more detail before it can be actioned.

- Describe the specific pipeline stages to be instrumented
- Provide an implementation approach
- Add measurable acceptance criteria

criterionNotes.what: Excellent description of A/B testing requirements.
criterionNotes.why: Compelling business case with customer demand data.
criterionNotes.how: Detailed architecture with traffic splitting approach.
criterionNotes.task: Comprehensive acceptance criteria with edge cases.
criterionNotes.size: Perfectly scoped for a single development iteration.

latest.verdict: Exemplary RFE. Could serve as a template for others.
latest.feedback:
**Outstanding quality across all criteria.**

This RFE demonstrates best practices:
- Clear problem definition
- Data-backed justification
- Detailed technical approach
- Measurable outcomes

criterionNotes.what: Adequate description but could be more specific.

latest.verdict: Meets minimum quality bar but has room for improvement.
latest.feedback:
This RFE passes the minimum threshold but could benefit from:
- More specific data quality checks to validate
- Clearer success metrics
- Edge case handling

criterionNotes.what: Clear description of RBAC requirements for model registry.
criterionNotes.why: Good but could reference specific compliance needs.
criterionNotes.how: Well-defined role hierarchy and permission model.
criterionNotes.task: Acceptance criteria present but could include edge cases.

latest.verdict: Solid RFE with strong technical detail.
latest.feedback:
Good overall quality.

- Add edge cases for permission inheritance

criterionNotes.size: At least the scope is contained.

latest.verdict: Fails on nearly all criteria. Requires complete rewrite.
latest.feedback:
This RFE is essentially a placeholder. It needs:
- A detailed problem description
- Business justification
- Technical approach
- Acceptance criteria

Consider using the RFE template to restructure.

criterionNotes.what: Thorough description of federated learning needs.
criterionNotes.how: Partial approach; needs more detail on aggregation.
criterionNotes.size: Too broad; covers multiple distinct capabilities.

latest.verdict: Good content but needs to be split into smaller RFEs.
latest.feedback:
Strong problem statement and justification, but the scope is too large.

**Recommendations:**
- Split into 3 separate RFEs:
  - Federated training infrastructure
  - Model aggregation framework
  - Privacy-preserving data handling

criterionNotes.what: Mentions latency improvement but vague on specifics.

latest.verdict: Below quality threshold. Needs clearer requirements.
latest.feedback:
**Key issues:**
- No specific latency targets defined
- Multiple potential approaches without a recommendation
- Missing acceptance criteria

**Suggestions:**
- Define target latency (e.g., p99 < 100ms)
- Choose and justify one implementation approach
- Add measurable acceptance criteria
